meta.notes: v1.0.6 installed from CMS via direct API. rootPrefix='video-translation/' — flattened correctly. Spanish translation, no lip sync. Single pass: Whisper→translate→clone→TTS→replace. Voice cloned and deleted (GE6zLXa94V2gOOyfmQkM). TTS generated 674.7KB audio.

test_input.name: charli-daily-vlog.mp4
test_input.description: Charli D'Amelio daily vlog, TikTok-style vertical short-form video

task.name: video-translation
task.purpose: Translate 67.8s English vlog video to Spanish, no lip sync. Tests full pipeline: transcribe→translate→voice clone→TTS→replace audio.
task.expected_output: MP4 with Spanish TTS audio track replacing original English; same video, dubbed audio

install.notes: CMS fetch 156ms. Zip 50KB downloaded in 122ms, extracted in 7ms. rootPrefix='video-translation/' flattened correctly. v1.0.6: 1090 lines. Subagent boot 17.4s.

steps.name: transcribe_waterfall
steps.notes: Whisper API hit first, succeeded. 676 chars transcribed. Log: 1.0s→4.0s

steps.name: translate_gpt4o
steps.notes: GPT-4o translation to Spanish. 715 chars output. Log: 4.0s→6.0s

steps.name: voice_clone_elevenlabs
steps.notes: ElevenLabs voice clone from source audio. Voice ID: GE6zLXa94V2gOOyfmQkM. Single-speaker model. Log: 6.0s→7.9s

steps.name: tts_eleven_v3
steps.notes: ElevenLabs TTS (eleven_v3) Spanish generation. Output 674.7KB. Log: 7.9s→32.8s. TTS is the dominant bottleneck at 70% of script time.

steps.name: replace_audio_ffmpeg
steps.notes: ffmpeg audio track replacement. Log: 32.8s→35.0s. Voice clone cleaned up after.

execution.notes: translate_video.py ran in 35.4s for 67.8s video = 0.52x realtime. TTS bottleneck: ~24.9s (70% of script time). Full pipeline completed without errors. Voice clone created and cleaned up in same run.

delivery.notes: Output 3328KB vs 4790KB input (0.69x — smaller because TTS audio is compressed differently). Upload ~236 KB/s (14.5s for 3.3MB).
